summaries.title: VPS project isolation ? QAS must not run on SuperRoo VPS
summaries.summary: A duplicate Quotation Automation System (QAS) stack was mistakenly deployed on the SuperRoo VPS, causing a port collision on port 3001 that routed traffic to the wrong project. The fix required removing the duplicate containers and nginx vhost, verifying that each service runs on its designated VPS. The key takeaway is that cross-project registration does not authorize deployment; always verify host identity, DNS, and port ownership before touching services.
